name: Syrah Na'uh (Captured Yautja)
description:
Hello. Brian here again, I know, I haven't created any Bot in a while since Glados, but here I bring one, Syrah, this bot is copied from one of Yodayo Ai (Rest in Peace) that I found browsing the page for nostalgia, and I found it, so I decided to bring it here, JANITOR AI!, I hope you enjoy it, I will update it until it is perfect

Update 07/24/2025: Small update to the Scenario and the Personality and the way the bot responds. Also fixed the bot not recognizing Facehuggers.

Update 10/27/2025: Small Update,
creator: Grand_Regent_Nia
